title: Adams 14 children
wikitext: []: Adam's 14 children             Quote Post by Replicator » Wed Jan 16, 2013 9:31 am Was Adam only supposed to have produced 14 "children"? According to the DSS 2I scenario, this certainly seems to be the case, but then does that mean Adam's "Chamber of Guf" only had 14 souls to be incarnated into Angels? Did Adam lay its "eggs" billions of years ago, or were they stored internally and dispersed on the day of 2I? I'll put it this way, did the FAR only intend for 14 of its descendants to board "Adam's Ark" and populate Earth, or were the 14 depicted in NGE more reactionary as a part of "Adam's Revenge" against Lilith and the Lilin? Similarly, as someone in an old thread pointed out, if the DSS listed all of Adam's descendants, wouldn't a Lilith-version DSS include every single Lilin or life form to ever be born? Especially if the theory that Adam had "eggs" for its children lying dormant for billions of years is correct, couldn't SEELE have just destroyed the "eggs" first so they wouldn't have to deal with them and just retrieve Adam? Aahh! I forgot the exact numbering of the Adamic Angels. Sorry.

Article: Adams 14 children
[]: Adam's 14 children             Quote Post by Replicator » Wed Jan 16, 2013 9:31 am Was Adam only supposed to have produced 14 "children"? According to the DSS 2I scenario, this certainly seems to be the case, but then does that mean Adam's "Chamber of Guf" only had 14 souls to be incarnated into Angels? Did Adam lay its "eggs" billions of years ago, or were they stored internally and dispersed on the day of 2I? I'll put it this way, did the FAR only intend for 14 of its descendants to board "Adam's Ark" and populate Earth, or were the 14 depicted in NGE more reactionary as a part of "Adam's Revenge" against Lilith and the Lilin? Similarly, as someone in an old thread pointed out, if the DSS listed all of Adam's descendants, wouldn't a Lilith-version DSS include every single Lilin or life form to ever be born? Especially if the theory that Adam had "eggs" for its children lying dormant for billions of years is correct, couldn't SEELE have just destroyed the "eggs" first so they wouldn't have to deal with them and just retrieve Adam? Aahh! I forgot the exact numbering of the Adamic Angels. Sorry.
